credentialRequirements.name: DISTRIBUTION_SIGNING_KEY
credentialRequirements.description: Game distribution platform signing key (Steam, itch.io, console-specific)

credentialRequirements.name: STEAM_PUBLISH_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Steam Web API key for automated Steam publishing

credentialRequirements.name: PLATFORM_PUBLISHER_ACCOUNT
credentialRequirements.description: Publisher account credentials for game distribution platform
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: Distribution platform (Steam, itch.io, game console partner portal)

approvalGate.blockedReason: Game distribution requires publisher account credentials, platform signing key, and compliance submission. Platform accounts require partner program enrollment. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Enroll in distribution platform publisher program
Complete platform compliance and content policy submission

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for game

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in game source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
